message:
feat(text-effects): add StyledMultiLine for AsciiArt + effects integration (bd-2bzl)

Add StyledMultiLine type that integrates AsciiArtText with the text
effects system using 2D coordinate mapping. Supports horizontal/animated
gradients, rainbow, color wave, fade, pulse, glow effects applied with
proper (x=col, y=row) mapping. Includes Reflection struct for mirrored
text rendering with linear opacity falloff. 15 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
